title: v6.7 release closure: ship Verifiable Governance
description: Close v6.7.0 by refreshing release docs/manifests, running release-state-audit with integrated governance gates, full tests, smoke, command help benchmark, organization verification, and preparing tag/release notes. Acceptance: package/bootstrap/manifest/docs agree on 6.7.0; release-state-audit includes archmap-impact, review-provenance, and evidence-independence gates; npm test and smoke pass; release checklist records evidence. Stop condition: release closure only; do not add new governance audit families.
triage_notes: Opened after TASK-075 integrated governance audits into release-state-audit and closed the CLI help input/output gap.
